about.title: About Us
about.storyText: We started this project to build a simple and modern shopping experience using React and TypeScript. The goal was to create a clean, responsive interface while exploring best practices in frontend development.
about.missionText: Our mission is to deliver a fast, intuitive, and accessible shopping experience. We focus on usability, performance, and scalability, making it easy to extend the app with features like internationalization and dynamic product data.
about.teamText: This project was built by a passionate developer focused on learning and applying modern web technologies. It serves as both a learning platform and a foundation for building real-world applications.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.prompt: Have feedback, questions, or ideas for improving the app?
contact.cta: Feel free to reach out — your input helps make this project better.
